title: Percy Buttons
question: 把今天课文里「新搬来的人还不知道本地惯例」放进现代安全场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景的空都填上、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: I have just moved to this building. When someone knocked at my door, I asked my dad to answer it. Later my neighbour said, "Everybody knows him."

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 刚搬到新小区、还不认识门口的人
options.english_template: I ___ to this building, so I do not know the people near the gate yet.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 有人敲门、先请大人处理
options.english_template: Someone ___, so I asked my dad to answer it.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 邻居解释这是大家都认识的熟人
options.english_template: My neighbour said, "___," so I knew this was a local routine.
